with date_spine as (
        





with rawdata as (

    

    

    with p as (
        select 0 as generated_number union all select 1
    ), unioned as (

    select

    
    p0.generated_number * power(2, 0)
     + 
    
    p1.generated_number * power(2, 1)
     + 
    
    p2.generated_number * power(2, 2)
     + 
    
    p3.generated_number * power(2, 3)
     + 
    
    p4.generated_number * power(2, 4)
     + 
    
    p5.generated_number * power(2, 5)
     + 
    
    p6.generated_number * power(2, 6)
     + 
    
    p7.generated_number * power(2, 7)
     + 
    
    p8.generated_number * power(2, 8)
    
    
    + 1
    as generated_number

    from

    
    p as p0
     cross join 
    
    p as p1
     cross join 
    
    p as p2
     cross join 
    
    p as p3
     cross join 
    
    p as p4
     cross join 
    
    p as p5
     cross join 
    
    p as p6
     cross join 
    
    p as p7
     cross join 
    
    p as p8
    
    

    )

    select *
    from unioned
    where generated_number <= 365
    order by generated_number



),

all_periods as (

    select (
        

    dateadd(
        day,
        row_number() over (order by 1) - 1,
        cast('2024-01-01' as date)
        )


    ) as date_day
    from rawdata

),

filtered as (

    select *
    from all_periods
    where date_day <= cast('2024-12-31' as date)

)

select * from filtered


    )
    select 
        date_day,
        dayname(date_day) as day_name,
        month(date_day) as month_num,
        year(date_day) as year_num
    from date_spine

/*
    Welcome to your first dbt model!
    Did you know that you can also configure models directly within SQL files?
    This will override configurations stated in dbt_project.yml

    Try changing "table" to "view" below
*/



with source_data as (

    select 1 as id
    union all
    select null as id

)

select *
from source_data

/*
    Uncomment the line below to remove records with null `id` values
*/

-- where id is not null
-- added line by snowflake_user

with raw_sales as (
    select 1 as sale_id, 'john doe' as customer_name, 15000 as amount_cents, '2024-01-15'::date as sale_date
    union all
    select 2, 'jane smith', 25000, '2024-02-20'::date
    union all
    select 3, 'bob johnson', 35000, '2024-03-10'::date
    union all
    select 4, null, 10000, '2024-04-05'::date
)

select
    sale_id,
    
    trim(upper(customer_name))
 as customer_name_clean,
    amount_cents,
    
    round(amount_cents / 100.0, 2)
 as amount_dollars,
    sale_date,
    
    case 
        when month(sale_date) >= 4
        then year(sale_date)
        else year(sale_date) - 1
    end
 as fiscal_year,
    
    
        current_timestamp()
    
 as loaded_at
from raw_sales
where customer_name is not null

-- Generated by AutomateDV (formerly known as dbtvault)

    

WITH source_data AS (

    SELECT

    CUSTOMER_ID,
    FIRST_NAME,
    LAST_NAME,
    EMAIL,
    PHONE

    FROM POC_DBT_PROJECT.RAW_VAULT.raw_customers
),

derived_columns AS (

    SELECT

    CUSTOMER_ID,
    FIRST_NAME,
    LAST_NAME,
    EMAIL,
    PHONE,
    'RAW_CUSTOMERS' AS RECORD_SOURCE,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() AS LOAD_DATE,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() AS EFFECTIVE_FROM

    FROM source_data
),

hashed_columns AS (

    SELECT

    CUSTOMER_ID,
    FIRST_NAME,
    LAST_NAME,
    EMAIL,
    PHONE,
    RECORD_SOURCE,
    LOAD_DATE,
    EFFECTIVE_FROM,

    CAST(MD5_BINARY(NULLIF(UPPER(TRIM(CAST(CUSTOMER_ID AS VARCHAR))), '')) AS BINARY(16)) AS CUSTOMER_HK,

    CAST(MD5_BINARY(CONCAT_WS('||',
        IFNULL(NULLIF(UPPER(TRIM(CAST(CUSTOMER_ID AS VARCHAR))), ''), '^^'),
        IFNULL(NULLIF(UPPER(TRIM(CAST(EMAIL AS VARCHAR))), ''), '^^'),
        IFNULL(NULLIF(UPPER(TRIM(CAST(FIRST_NAME AS VARCHAR))), ''), '^^'),
        IFNULL(NULLIF(UPPER(TRIM(CAST(LAST_NAME AS VARCHAR))), ''), '^^'),
        IFNULL(NULLIF(UPPER(TRIM(CAST(PHONE AS VARCHAR))), ''), '^^')
    )) AS BINARY(16)) AS CUSTOMER_HASHDIFF

    FROM derived_columns
),

columns_to_select AS (

    SELECT

    CUSTOMER_ID,
    FIRST_NAME,
    LAST_NAME,
    EMAIL,
    PHONE,
    RECORD_SOURCE,
    LOAD_DATE,
    EFFECTIVE_FROM,
    CUSTOMER_HK,
    CUSTOMER_HASHDIFF

    FROM hashed_columns
)

SELECT * FROM columns_to_select

WITH source_data AS (

    SELECT

    ORDER_ID,
    CUSTOMER_ID,
    ORDER_DATE,
    TOTAL_AMOUNT,
    STATUS

    FROM POC_DBT_PROJECT.RAW_VAULT.raw_orders
),

derived_columns AS (

    SELECT

    ORDER_ID,
    CUSTOMER_ID,
    ORDER_DATE,
    TOTAL_AMOUNT,
    STATUS,
    'RAW_ORDERS' AS RECORD_SOURCE,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() AS LOAD_DATE,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() AS EFFECTIVE_FROM

    FROM source_data
),

hashed_columns AS (

    SELECT

    ORDER_ID,
    CUSTOMER_ID,
    ORDER_DATE,
    TOTAL_AMOUNT,
    STATUS,
    RECORD_SOURCE,
    LOAD_DATE,
    EFFECTIVE_FROM,

    CAST(MD5_BINARY(NULLIF(UPPER(TRIM(CAST(ORDER_ID AS VARCHAR))), '')) AS BINARY(16)) AS ORDER_HK,

    CAST(MD5_BINARY(NULLIF(UPPER(TRIM(CAST(CUSTOMER_ID AS VARCHAR))), '')) AS BINARY(16)) AS CUSTOMER_HK,

    CAST(MD5_BINARY(NULLIF(CONCAT_WS('||',
        IFNULL(NULLIF(UPPER(TRIM(CAST(CUSTOMER_ID AS VARCHAR))), ''), '^^'),
        IFNULL(NULLIF(UPPER(TRIM(CAST(ORDER_ID AS VARCHAR))), ''), '^^')
    ), '^^||^^')) AS BINARY(16)) AS CUSTOMER_ORDER_HK,

    CAST(MD5_BINARY(CONCAT_WS('||',
        IFNULL(NULLIF(UPPER(TRIM(CAST(ORDER_DATE AS VARCHAR))), ''), '^^'),
        IFNULL(NULLIF(UPPER(TRIM(CAST(ORDER_ID AS VARCHAR))), ''), '^^'),
        IFNULL(NULLIF(UPPER(TRIM(CAST(STATUS AS VARCHAR))), ''), '^^'),
        IFNULL(NULLIF(UPPER(TRIM(CAST(TOTAL_AMOUNT AS VARCHAR))), ''), '^^')
    )) AS BINARY(16)) AS ORDER_HASHDIFF

    FROM derived_columns
),

columns_to_select AS (

    SELECT

    ORDER_ID,
    CUSTOMER_ID,
    ORDER_DATE,
    TOTAL_AMOUNT,
    STATUS,
    RECORD_SOURCE,
    LOAD_DATE,
    EFFECTIVE_FROM,
    ORDER_HK,
    CUSTOMER_HK,
    CUSTOMER_ORDER_HK,
    ORDER_HASHDIFF

    FROM hashed_columns
)

SELECT * FROM columns_to_select

select date_day
from POC_DBT_PROJECT.UTILS_staging.date_dimension
where date_day is null

select
    date_day as unique_field,
    count(*) as n_records

from POC_DBT_PROJECT.UTILS_staging.date_dimension
where date_day is not null
group by date_day
having count(*) > 1

-- Use the `ref` function to select from other models

select *
from POC_DBT_PROJECT.UTILS_staging.my_first_dbt_model
where id = 1

with sales as (
    select * from POC_DBT_PROJECT.UTILS_staging.sales_data
),

date_dim as (
    select * from POC_DBT_PROJECT.UTILS_staging.date_dimension
)

select
    s.sale_id,
    s.customer_name_clean,
    s.amount_dollars,
    s.sale_date,
    d.day_name,
    d.month_num,
    md5(cast(coalesce(cast(s.sale_id as TEXT), '_dbt_utils_surrogate_key_null_') || '-' || coalesce(cast(s.customer_name_clean as TEXT), '_dbt_utils_surrogate_key_null_') as TEXT)) as surrogate_key,
    
    ( s.amount_dollars ) / nullif( ( nullif(d.month_num, 0) ), 0)
 as amount_per_month_num
from sales s
left join date_dim d on s.sale_date = d.date_day

select sale_id
from POC_DBT_PROJECT.UTILS_staging.sales_data
where sale_id is null

select
    sale_id as unique_field,
    count(*) as n_records

from POC_DBT_PROJECT.UTILS_staging.sales_data
where sale_id is not null
group by sale_id
having count(*) > 1

-- Generated by AutomateDV (formerly known as dbtvault)

    

WITH row_rank_1 AS (
    SELECT rr.CUSTOMER_HK, rr.CUSTOMER_ID, rr.LOAD_DATE, rr.RECORD_SOURCE
    FROM POC_DBT_PROJECT.UTILS_staging.stg_customers AS rr
    WHERE rr.CUSTOMER_HK IS NOT NULL
    QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(
        PARTITION BY rr.CUSTOMER_HK
        ORDER BY rr.LOAD_DATE
    ) = 1
),

records_to_insert AS (
    SELECT a.CUSTOMER_HK, a.CUSTOMER_ID, a.LOAD_DATE, a.RECORD_SOURCE
    FROM row_rank_1 AS a
    LEFT JOIN POC_DBT_PROJECT.UTILS_raw_vault.hub_customer AS d
    ON a.CUSTOMER_HK = d.CUSTOMER_HK
    WHERE d.CUSTOMER_HK IS NULL
)

SELECT * FROM records_to_insert

-- Generated by AutomateDV (formerly known as dbtvault)

    

WITH source_data AS (
    SELECT a.CUSTOMER_HK, a.CUSTOMER_HASHDIFF, a.FIRST_NAME, a.LAST_NAME, a.EMAIL, a.PHONE, a.EFFECTIVE_FROM, a.LOAD_DATE, a.RECORD_SOURCE
    FROM POC_DBT_PROJECT.UTILS_staging.stg_customers AS a
    WHERE a.CUSTOMER_HK IS NOT NULL
),

latest_records AS (
    SELECT current_records.CUSTOMER_HK, current_records.CUSTOMER_HASHDIFF, current_records.LOAD_DATE
    FROM POC_DBT_PROJECT.UTILS_raw_vault.sat_customer AS current_records
    JOIN (
        SELECT DISTINCT source_data.CUSTOMER_HK
        FROM source_data
    ) AS source_records
        ON source_records.CUSTOMER_HK = current_records.CUSTOMER_HK
    QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
        PARTITION BY current_records.CUSTOMER_HK
        ORDER BY current_records.LOAD_DATE DESC
    ) = 1
),

unique_source_records AS (
    SELECT
        sd.CUSTOMER_HK, sd.CUSTOMER_HASHDIFF, sd.FIRST_NAME, sd.LAST_NAME, sd.EMAIL, sd.PHONE, sd.EFFECTIVE_FROM, sd.LOAD_DATE, sd.RECORD_SOURCE
    FROM source_data AS sd
    LEFT OUTER JOIN latest_records AS lr
        ON sd.CUSTOMER_HK = lr.CUSTOMER_HK

    QUALIFY sd.CUSTOMER_HASHDIFF !=
        LAG(sd.CUSTOMER_HASHDIFF, 1,
            COALESCE(
                lr.CUSTOMER_HASHDIFF,
                CAST('FFFFFFFF' AS BINARY(16))
            )
        ) OVER (
            PARTITION BY sd.CUSTOMER_HK
            ORDER BY sd.LOAD_DATE ASC,
                     sd.EFFECTIVE_FROM ASC
        )
),

records_to_insert AS (
    SELECT usr.CUSTOMER_HK, usr.CUSTOMER_HASHDIFF, usr.FIRST_NAME, usr.LAST_NAME, usr.EMAIL, usr.PHONE, usr.EFFECTIVE_FROM, usr.LOAD_DATE, usr.RECORD_SOURCE
    FROM unique_source_records AS usr
)

SELECT * FROM records_to_insert
